title: デビュー戦の後に・変われる1歩を

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I did it... I finished the race! I've debuted!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Wahhh... Thank you! B-b...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Big... Brother.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Big... Sister.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Heh... hehe! I can't wait to see where we go next!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With her debut officially complete, Rice has
taken her first step forward.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A few days later...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We visit the racecourse again.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In addition to getting an opportunity to study the
other racers, spectating other races will certainly
be a good experience. However...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Wow... there are so many people. It's like a G1
race...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Wait, I thought you said today's race wasn't
even graded.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Here she is! Mihono Bourbon! What a way to
make a debut!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Bourbon.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
She closes the distance and takes the lead! But
she doesn't stop there! She keeps going, going,
goooiiing...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Aaand she's done it! Mihono Bourbon crosses the
finish line in first place!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Wow. The Classics are going to be incredible next
year. I'm totally going to root for Mihono
Bourbon.

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Me too! She's sure to be the Triple Crown
champion! We have to watch all of her races.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Everyone's smiling because of Bourbon.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: The cheers... are so much louder than when I ran...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...I wonder if I can ever be like her.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Big Brother?!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Big Sister?!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Your voice is like a magic spell.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Your voice is like a magic spell.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
It's making me think... even I can do the
impossible.
choice_data_list: Do you want to run in the Classics too?
Do you want to run in the Classics too?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: The Classics...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Running in the Classics means facing off against
the other racers who debuted in the same year as
her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It also means she'll have a chance to go up
against Mihono Bourbon.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Can I... really catch up to her? She seems so far
away.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...You always believe in me, no matter what.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...You always believe in me, no matter what.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Okay. I'll do it.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I'm kind of scared... but I don't want to be a
useless girl forever.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I... I'll do my best to catch up to her—to Bourbon.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with that, Rice Shower and I resolve to take
on the Classics.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But first, as a warm-up for the Triple Crown tour,
we decide to take on the Spring Stakes.
